category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: No XML sitemap found

category.name: Core SEO
category.rule: Missing page title; Missing document title Pages (1): /
No H1 tag found Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (No H1 tag found)
Description too short Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (WatchlistID — Track, rate, and discover movies and (60 chars))
Missing canonical URL Pages (1): /
Missing og:title; Missing og:description; Missing og:image - social shares will lack imagery Pages (1): /
No favicon found Pages (1): /
No Twitter card or Open Graph tags for Twitter sharing Pages (1): /

category.name: Security
category.rule: Page not served over HTTPS Pages (1): /
No Content-Security-Policy header
No clickjacking protection

category.name: Links
category.rule: Too few internal links (0, min 1) Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (Too few internal links (0, min 1))
Page has no outgoing internal links (dead-end) Pages (1): /

category.name: Content
category.rule: Thin content: 0 words (min 300) Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (Thin content: 0 words (min 300))

category.name: Performance
category.rule: 1 JS file(s) exceed 1.0 MB Items (1): - /node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&hot=false&lazy=true&transform.routerRoot=app&transform.reactCompiler=true [sizeBytes: 13356116, size: 12.7 MB, status: 200, contentType: application/javascript; charset=UTF-8] (from: /)
Slow server response (733ms) Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (Slow server response (733ms))
No compression detected (41KB uncompressed) Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (No compression detected (41KB uncompressed))
Total tracked resources: 13082KB (very heavy)
1 CSS file(s) appear unminified Pages (1): / Items (1): - inline style (38.7KB, ~0.6KB savings) [reason: high newlines (1.7%)]
HTTP/2 requires HTTPS Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (HTTP/2 requires HTTPS)

category.name: Accessibility
category.rule: 1 progressbar element(s) without accessible names Pages (1): / Items (1): - div[role="progressbar"]
Page has no main landmark Pages (1): /
No bypass mechanism for repetitive content Pages (1): /
No <main> landmark found Pages (1): /

category.name: E-E-A-T
category.rule: No About page found
No content pages have author attribution
No Contact page found
No Privacy Policy page found
No content pages have datePublished

category.name: Legal Compliance
category.rule: No privacy policy link found across site
